topic_title: South African Constitutional Court orders Parliament to revisit Cyril Ramaphosa impeachment
topic_summary: The Constitutional Court of South Africa has ruled that Parliament acted unlawfully when it blocked impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa. The decision has led to renewed calls for the president's resignation and warnings from political allies about the precedent of using judicial rulings for political vendettas.

findings.title: South Africa: South Africa Constitutional Court Rules Parliament Unlawfully Blocked Ramaphosa Impeachment Bid
findings.summary: [Capital FM] South Africa's Constitutional Court has ruled that Parliament acted unconstitutionally when it halted efforts to initiate impeachment proceedings against President Cyril Ramaphosa in 2022.
findings.text: South Africa: South Africa Constitutional Court Rules Parliament Unlawfully Blocked Ramaphosa Impeachment Bid | [Capital FM] South Africa's Constitutional Court has ruled that Parliament acted unconstitutionally when it halted efforts to initiate impeachment proceedings against President Cyril Ramaphosa in 2022.

findings.title: South Africa Constitutional Court orders Parliament to revisit Ramaphosa impeachment proceedings
findings.summary: Cyril Ramaphosa's presidency is on the line, as lawmakers will now have to reconsider whether there are grounds to impeach him over the scandal dubbed "Farmgate."
findings.text: South Africa Constitutional Court orders Parliament to revisit Ramaphosa impeachment proceedings | Cyril Ramaphosa's presidency is on the line, as lawmakers will now have to reconsider whether there are grounds to impeach him over the scandal dubbed "Farmgate."

findings.title: S’Africa court overturns vote quashing impeachment proceedings against Ramaphosa
findings.summary:
South Africa's Constitutional Court on Friday overturned a vote in parliament that had quashed the opening of impeachment proceedings against President Cyril Ramaphosa over a cash-heist scandal.
The post S’Africa court overturns vote quashing impeachment proceedings against Ramaphosa appeared first on Vanguard News.
findings.text:
S’Africa court overturns vote quashing impeachment proceedings against Ramaphosa | South Africa's Constitutional Court on Friday overturned a vote in parliament that had quashed the opening of impeachment proceedings against President Cyril Ramaphosa over a cash-heist scandal.
The post S’Africa court overturns vote quashing impeachment proceedings against Ramaphosa appeared first on Vanguard News.

findings.title: Senate amends Electoral Act on court jurisdiction on pre-election disputes
findings.summary:
The amendment now allows aspirants challenging a candidate’s documents to file such suits at any court in the Federal Capital Territory or in the jurisdiction where the cause of action arose. 
The post Senate amends Electoral Act on court jurisdiction on pre-election disputes appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.
findings.text:
Senate amends Electoral Act on court jurisdiction on pre-election disputes | The amendment now allows aspirants challenging a candidate’s documents to file such suits at any court in the Federal Capital Territory or in the jurisdiction where the cause of action arose. 
The post Senate amends Electoral Act on court jurisdiction on pre-election disputes appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

findings.title: Moraes autoriza hacker Delgatti a cumprir regime aberto de prisão
findings.summary:
O ministro Alexandre de Moraes, do Supremo Tribunal Federal (STF), autorizou nesta quinta-feira (7) o hacker Walter Delgatti a passar para o regime aberto de cumprimento de pena.

Em maio de 2025, Delgatti foi condenado pelo Supremo a oito meses e seis anos de prisão em regime fechado por ter invadido o site do Conselho Nacional de Justiça (CNJ) a mando da ex-deputada Carla Zambelli, também condenada no processo, e ter emitido um mandado de prisão falso contra o ministro.

Notícias relacionad...

findings.summary: La oposición —particularmente Partido Acción Nacional y Partido Revolucionario Institucional— ha elevado el tono y propone ir más allá del aplazamiento: revertir por completo la reforma judicial.

findings.title: Côte d’Ivoire: après la dissolution de la Commission électorale, l’opposition fixe ses conditions
findings.summary: Le gouvernement a dissous hier la Commission électorale indépendante. Depuis 25 ans, la CEI organise et supervise les scrutins électoraux. Elle était régulièrement l’objet de vives critiques des partis politiques, qui la soupçonnent d’être déséquilibrée et partisane. Après l’annonce de sa dissolution, la classe politique pose des conditions concernant la mise en place d’un nouveau système de gestion des élections.
findings.text: Côte d’Ivoire: après la dissolution de la Commission électorale, l’opposition fixe ses conditions | Le gouvernement a dissous hier la Commission électorale indépendante. Depuis 25 ans, la CEI organise et supervise les scrutins électoraux. Elle était régulièrement l’objet de vives critiques des partis politiques, qui la soupçonnent d’être déséquilibrée et partisane. Après l’annonce de sa dissolution, la classe politique pose des conditions concernant la mise en place d’un nouveau système de gestion des élections.

findings.title: Liberia: Criminal Court 'C' Sets Final Arguments in U.S.$6.2m Economic Sabotage Case Against Tweah, Four Others
findings.summary: [Liberian Investigator] MONROVIA -- A Monrovia criminal court has scheduled final arguments for Friday in the high-profile economic sabotage trial of former Finance and Development Planning Minister Samuel D. Tweah Jr. and four co-defendants accused of unlawfully disbursing more than US$6.2 million in public funds during the 2023 elections period, setting the stage for jury deliberations in one of Liberia's most politically charged corruption cases in years.
findings.text: Liberia: Criminal Court 'C' Sets Final Arguments in U.S.$6.2m Economic Sabotage Case Against Tweah, Four Others | [Liberian Investigator] MONROVIA -- A Monrovia criminal court has scheduled final arguments for Friday in the high-profile economic sabotage trial of former Finance and Development Planning Minister Samuel D. Tweah Jr. and four co-defendants accused of unlawfully disbursing more than US$6.2 million in public funds during the 2023 elections period, setting the stage for jury deliberations in one of Liberia's most politically charged corruption cases in years.

findings.title: Belediye başkanını kıyafeti üzerinden hedef almıştı: İkinci duruşmada tahliye
findings.summary: Eskişehir’in Mihalgazi Belediye Başkanı Zeynep Güneş Akgün’ü giydiği geleneksel kıyafetleri üzerinden hedef alan paylaşımlarda bulunduğu gerekçesiyle tutuklanan Mehmet Emin Korkmaz, ikinci duruşmada tahliye edildi. Duruşmada mütalaasını veren savcı, sanık Korkmaz hakkında ‘Halkı kin ve düşmanlığa tahrik veya aşağılama’ ve ‘Kamu görevlisine hakaret’ suçlarından 5 yıla kadar hapis talep etti.
findings.text: Belediye başkanını kıyafeti üzerinden hedef almıştı: İkinci duruşmada tahliye | Eskişehir’in Mihalgazi Belediye Başkanı Zeynep Güneş Akgün’ü giydiği geleneksel kıyafetleri üzerinden hedef alan paylaşımlarda bulunduğu gerekçesiyle tutuklanan Mehmet Emin Korkmaz, ikinci duruşmada tahliye edildi. Duruşmada mütalaasını veren savcı, sanık Korkmaz hakkında ‘Halkı kin ve düşmanlığa tahrik veya aşağılama’ ve ‘Kamu görevlisine hakaret’ suçlarından 5 yıla kadar hapis talep etti.

findings.title: Screening: APC receives petition against Ekiti senator
findings.summary:
The ruling All Progressives Congress, APC, on Friday began the screening of aspirants for various elective positions ahead of its 2027 election primaries, with a member from Ekiti State, Afuye Idowu, filing the first petition, calling for the disqualification of Senator Cyril Fasuyi from the forthcoming Ekiti North Senatorial District primary elections.
The post Screening: APC receives petition against Ekiti senator appeared first on Vanguard News.
findings.text:
Screening: APC receives petition against Ekiti senator | The ruling All Progressives Congress, APC, on Friday began the screening of aspirants for various elective positions ahead of its 2027 election primaries, with a member from Ekiti State, Afuye Idowu, filing the first petition, calling for the disqualification of Senator Cyril Fasuyi from the forthcoming Ekiti North Senatorial District primary elections.
The post Screening: APC receives petition against Ekiti senator appeared first on Vanguard News.

findings.title: Mendonça diz que não teve acesso à proposta de delação de Vorcaro
findings.summary:
O ministro André Mendonça, do Supremo Tribunal Federal (STF), afirmou nesta quinta-feira (7) que uma colaboração premiada deve ser "séria e efetiva".

A declaração foi divulgada pelo gabinete do ministro após matérias jornalísticas informarem que Mendonça teria sinalizado aos advogados do banqueiro Daniel Vorcaro, dono do Banco Master, que não pretende homologar os atuais termos da proposta de delação apresentada ontem à Procuradoria-Geral da República (PGR) e a Polícia Federal (PF).

Notícia...

findings.title: В России будет новая уполномоченная по правам человека — это Яна Лантратова. Ее назначение лоббировал Никита Михалков, узнала «Медуза». Она призывала запретить «Свидетелей Иеговы» и помогала Сергею Миронову насильно вывезти ребенка из Херсона
findings.summary: 13 мая Госдуме предстоит избрать нового уполномоченного по правам человека. Действующий омбудсмен Татьяна Москалькова, проработавшая два срока, по закону больше не может занимать этот пост. Кандидатура нового уполномоченного уже известна — это депутат Госдумы от «Справедливой России», бывшая чиновница администрации президента и провластная общественница Яна Лантратова. «Медуза» рассказывает, кто она такая, и как на ее назначение повлиял режиссер Никита Михалков.
findings.text: В России будет новая уполномоченная по правам человека — это Яна Лантратова. Ее назначение лоббировал Никита Михалков, узнала «Медуза». Она призывала запретить «Свидетелей Иеговы» и помогала Сергею Миронову насильно вывезти ребенка из Херсона | 13 мая Госдуме предстоит избрать нового уполномоченного по правам человека. Действующий омбудсмен Татьяна Москалькова, проработавшая два срока, по закону больше не может занимать этот пост. Кандидатура нового уполномоченного уже известна — это депутат Госдумы от «Справедливой России», бывшая чиновница администрации президента и провластная общественница Яна Лантратова. «Медуза» рассказывает, кто она такая, и как на ее назначение повлиял режиссер Никита Михалков.

findings.title: Congo: un gouvernement sans véritable nouveauté a pris ses fonctions
findings.summary: Mercredi 6 mai, s'est tenu le premier conseil des ministres de la nouvelle équipe gouvernementale au Congo-Brazzaville. L'occasion de s'arrêter sur la composition de ce gouvernement qui est donc, le premier, nommé, du nouveau et en principe (selon la Constitution) dernier mandat du président Denis Sassou Nguesso, déclaré vainqueur après le scrutin de mars dernier.

findings.title: South Africa: South African Xenophobic Violence - When the State Retreats, Something Else Governs
findings.summary: [Daily Maverick] The African Commission on Human and Peoples' Rights has warned that violence against African migrants in South Africa reflects a 'longstanding pattern' of grave rights violations, yet the response from political leadership has been marked more by silence, denial and escalation than accountability. As xenophobic rhetoric becomes normalised and even rewarded in public life, the line between governance and vigilante authority continues to blur.
findings.text: South Africa: South African Xenophobic Violence - When the State Retreats, Something Else Governs | [Daily Maverick] The African Commission on Human and Peoples' Rights has warned that violence against African migrants in South Africa reflects a 'longstanding pattern' of grave rights violations, yet the response from political leadership has been marked more by silence, denial and escalation than accountability. As xenophobic rhetoric becomes normalised and even rewarded in public life, the line between governance and vigilante authority continues to blur.

findings.summary: Yeni nesil çetelerden Daltonlar suç örgütü, Somali’nin eski İçişleri Bakanı ve halen İslam İşbirliği Teşkilatı’nın temsilcisi olan Abdülkadir Muallim Nur’a suikast planladı. findings.title: Мосгорсуд отменил решение о запрете «ЯПлакалъ»
findings.summary: Мосгорсуд отменил решение о запрете распространения в России информации, размещенной на сайте «ЯПлакалъ», сообщает пресс-служба судов Москвы.
findings.text: Мосгорсуд отменил решение о запрете «ЯПлакалъ» | Мосгорсуд отменил решение о запрете распространения в России информации, размещенной на сайте «ЯПлакалъ», сообщает пресс-служба судов Москвы.
